company_name: The name of the company. For example, 'Elexion Automotive'.
transition_complete: A boolean flag indicating if the company has completed its transition to fully automated inventory management. 'Yes' if the transition is complete, 'No' otherwise.
completion_date: The date when the transition to fully automated inventory management was completed. For example, '2025-07-15'.
total_production_facilities: The total number of production facilities that the company has. For example, '60'.
inventory_system_type: The type of inventory management system implemented by the company. For example, 'Fully automated'.
